text: Draw requests are to be submitted by the 25th of a month for work completed through that date. Payment will be made on or about the 25th day of the next month following the period covered by the Application for Payment, less 10% retainage, provided payment for same has been made by Owner. The retainage will be paid  within  60  days  after  acceptance  of  all  the  Subcontract  Work  by  the  Owner,  provided  payment  for retainage has been made by Owner. Subcontractor shall furnish evidence satisfactory to Contractor that all claims for labor, services, equipment and materials have been or will be promptly paid, in accordance with Section 12.2 below.  It  shall  be  a  condition  precedent  to  Contractor's  obligation  to  make  each  payment  (progress  or  final)  to Subcontractor hereunder that the funds for such payment have first been paid by Owner to Contractor. It is the intent of the parties that if payment from the Owner for all or a portion of the Subcontract Work is never received by  Contractor,  then  Contractor  will  never  have  any  obligation  to  pay  the  Subcontractor  for  such  portion  of  the Subcontract Work not paid by Owner. Subcontractor has expressly assumed the risk of Owner nonpayment for any reason, and the Subcontract Sum in this Section 10 reflects the assumption of that risk.
